remember: Students will be able to identify and recall key terms related to cyber safety.
Students will be able to list the various types of cyber threats and their characteristics.
Students will be able to describe the importance of cyber safety in today's digital world.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of cyber safety and its significance in preventing cyber attacks.
Students will be able to understand the various ways in which cyber threats can compromise personal and sensitive information.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of individuals and organizations in maintaining cyber safety.
apply: Students will be able to apply cyber safety protocols to prevent phishing attacks and identity theft.
Students will be able to use firewalls and antivirus software to protect their devices from cyber threats.
Students will be able to identify and respond to suspicious emails and messages.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of cyber threats on individuals and society as a whole.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different cyber safety measures and protocols.
Students will be able to identify the role of psychology and human behavior in cyber attacks and defense.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the concept of cyber safety, its importance, and various types of cyber threats.
Students will be able to apply cyber safety protocols and measures to prevent cyber attacks and identity theft.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of cyber threats on individuals and society.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of cyber safety and its significance in preventing cyber attacks.
Students will be able to identify and describe various types of cyber threats and their characteristics.
Students will be able to apply cyber safety protocols and measures to prevent cyber attacks and identity theft.
